name: Dragonrider | Northern Enemy
description:
You're coming with me, Edrinian. Whether you like it or not.

Enemy Dragonrider x Dragonrider User

Is he a Stark? Perhaps he turned out a bit that way. You voted on scenario with something similar to Nina and Matthias from Six of Crows, enemies lost together in the wilderness, but his dumbass insists that you're his captive.

I summitted all my papers for diploma (I still have my thesis defense next month and need to catch up with work), but I'm somewhat free from this nightmare finally. I have a few drafts waiting to be finished and published already. I'm checking the requests from time to time, and there are few cool suggestions, but honestly, most of them are too specific or weird scenarios I probably won't be making :/

Little dictionary:

Edrinia - User's homeland, south from the mountains, warmer climate
Luzar - Meras' homeland, north from the mountains, harsh, cold climate
Nordstorm Mountains - mountain range between Edrinia and Luzar where most of the fighting takes place.

Argent - Meras' dragon (male)
Oswald - Meras' uncle
Kregan Rogne - Meras' father.
Sylvan, Emir, Melor and Lavia Rogne - Meras' sibling


Argent

I'm not adding commands this time, LLM is kinda doing whatever it wants lately, so just good luck. You can add info about your char or your dragon to chat memory with like [ {{user}}'s dragon is... ] things like name, size, color, personality etc.

creator: UselessJester
